ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. ICC Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 2 pages. All fields legible. Bilingual English/Russian content.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate remarks field contains '7200224860' which is a shipment reference number, not an LC reference. The payment terms on page 2 of the invoice mention that the buyer 'may use the letter of credit form of settlement' but this is optional language and no actual LC number is provided. LC exception is NOT activated.

locations_found: Invoice page 2: footer center 'Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'

candidates.raw_text: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN
candidates.normalized_text: ericsson ab, torshamnsgatan 23, s-164 80 stockholm, sweden

criteria_met: Consignor ERICSSON AB matches invoice issuer ERICSSON AB (criterion 2)
Consignee KCELL JSC matches invoice delivery address KCELL JSC (criterion 3)
Shipment reference 7200224860 in certificate remarks matches invoice shipment nr EAB-7200224860 (criterion 1 - reference match)
pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met. The certificate consignor (ERICSSON AB) is the invoice issuer, the consignee (KCELL JSC) appears in the delivery address, and the reference number 7200224860 from the certificate remarks matches the shipment number EAB-7200224860 on the invoice.

consignor.invoice_value: ERICSSON AB, Torshamnsgatan 21-23, S-164 83 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN (page 1 header); Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN (page 2 footer)

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.detail: ERICSSON AB found in invoice page 1 header top-left ('ERICSSON AB'), page 1 footer ('Manufacturer / Производитель: Ericsson AB', 'Supplier : ERICSSON'), page 2 footer ('Ericsson AB'). Name directly and exactly matches.
Certificate: 'ERICSSON AB'. Invoice header: 'ERICSSON AB'. Exact match after case normalization.
Certificate country: SWEDEN. Invoice page 1 header: 'STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Invoice page 2: 'SWEDEN', VAT No 'SE556056625801' (SE prefix confirms Sweden). Country verified.
Both documents: Sweden. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice
Country via VAT prefix SE and explicit address

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' in certificate exactly matches 'ERICSSON AB' in invoice header (page 1) and footer (page 2). Country Sweden is confirmed by explicit address 'STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN' and VAT prefix SE. Address differs slightly (certificate: Torshamnsgatan 23, 164 80; invoice header: Torshamnsgatan 21-23, S-164 83; invoice page 2 footer: Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80). Per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country match. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ERICSSON AB, TORSHAMNSGATAN 23, 164 80, STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Invoice issuer (page 1 header): 'ERICSSON AB, Torshamnsgatan 21-23, S-164 83 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Invoice page 2 footer: 'Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Company name 'ERICSSON AB' is an exact match. Country 'SWEDEN' matches. Minor address variation (21-23 vs 23, 164 83 vs 164 80) is allowed per 4.1.5. Rule 4.1.0 confirms name found in invoice. Result: MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: KCELL JSC, ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004 ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN
consignee.invoice_value: KCELL JSC, ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004, ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN (DELIVERY ADDRESS)

comparison_steps.description: Priority order – identify primary billing field
comparison_steps.result: No separate 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' field found. Invoice only has 'DELIVERY ADDRESS' field for KCELL JSC.
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice lacks a dedicated billing/facturation field. The only named party other than the issuer is 'KCELL JSC' under 'DELIVERY ADDRESS'. Per 4.2.1.1, when no primary billing field exists, secondary fields may be used.

comparison_steps.description: Fallback to delivery address as no billing field exists
comparison_steps.detail: KCELL JSC found in DELIVERY ADDRESS field of invoice. Since no separate billing party exists, this is accepted.
Certificate: 'KCELL JSC'. Invoice: 'KCELL JSC'. Exact match.
Certificate: KAZAKHSTAN. Invoice: KAZAKHSTAN. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – no primary billing field found, fallback to delivery address
Alternative recipient address – delivery address used as fallback

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'KCELL JSC' in certificate exactly matches 'KCELL JSC' in invoice delivery address. The invoice has no separate billing/invoice-to field; only a 'DELIVERY ADDRESS' field naming KCELL JSC. Per rule 4.2.1.1, when no primary billing field exists, the delivery address may be used. Address (ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004 ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN) matches exactly. Country Kazakhstan matches. MATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'KCELL JSC, ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004 ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN'. Invoice delivery address: 'KCELL JSC, ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004, ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN'. Name exact match. Address exact match. Country exact match. No separate billing party found in invoice. Result: MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
42 PACKAGES
TELECOM EQUIPMENT
PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs
PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs
goods_description.invoice_value: Telecommunication Equipment: / AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs (items 2.1.1.1.1.1.1 and 2.1.1.2.1.1.1)

comparison_steps.detail: No explicit article numbers are provided in the certificate. The goods are described by product designation 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs', which is a product model designation, not an article number field.

comparison_steps.description: Controlled text matching – identify identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate main designation: 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs'. Invoice: 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' (found in both line items 2.1.1.1.1.1.1 and 2.1.1.2.1.1.1). Exact match of the identity-bearing main designation.

Certificate also says 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice says 'Telecommunication Equipment:'. 'TELECOM' vs 'Telecommunication' – TELECOM is a widely recognized abbreviation of Telecommunication. This is a general product category header, not the identity-bearing main designation. The identity-bearing main designation 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' matches exactly. The general category 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' / 'Telecommunication Equipment' is a non-identity-bearing addition.
Certificate has a single country of origin (PL). No multiple origins to couple.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' is a general category header

goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs'. This exact text string is found in both invoice line items (2.1.1.1.1.1.1 and 2.1.1.2.1.1.1). The certificate additionally states 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' as a general product category, which corresponds to 'Telecommunication Equipment' in the invoice header. The certificate lists this product twice ('PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' repeated), matching the two line items in the invoice. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: '42 PACKAGES / TELECOM EQUIPMENT / PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs / PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs'. Invoice goods: 'Telecommunication Equipment:' header, then 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' in two line items. Identity-bearing main designation 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' is an exact match in both documents. 'PL' prefix in certificate refers to country of origin Poland, which matches the COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column in the invoice. '42 PACKAGES' matches the BOX total of 42 in the invoice. Result: MATCH.

quantity.invoice_value: GRAND TOTAL Gross Weight: 5 298,000 (page 1); Gross Weight: 5.298,000 kg (page 2)

comparison_steps.result: G.W 5298,000 KG identified as the verification quantity from box 7
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains 'G.W 5298,000 KG'. This is the verifying quantity. Box 6 also mentions '42 PACKAGES' which is a secondary quantity (package count).
Certificate specifies 'G.W' (Gross Weight) with unit KG. Category is explicit.

Certificate: GW 5298.000 KG. Invoice page 1 GRAND TOTAL row GROSS WEIGHT column: '5 298,000'. Invoice page 2: 'Gross Weight: 5.298,000 kg'. After thousands-separator normalization (removing space in '5 298,000' or dot in '5.298,000'), both yield 5298.000. Certificate value 5298.000 matches exactly.

Invoice page 1: '5 298,000' – space is thousands separator, comma is decimal separator → 5298.000. Invoice page 2: '5.298,000 kg' – dot is thousands separator, comma is decimal separator → 5298.000. Certificate: '5298,000 KG' – comma is decimal separator → 5298.000. All normalize to identical value 5298.000.

comparison_steps.description: Multiple quantity check – secondary quantity '42 PACKAGES'
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate box 6: '42 PACKAGES'. Invoice GRAND TOTAL BOX column: '42'. Invoice page 2: 'Box: 42'. This secondary quantity also matches. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 is the verifying quantity – G.W 5298,000 KG
Weight category GW explicitly stated with unit KG
Occurrence check – numeric value 5298.000 found in invoice
Thousands separator normalization applied to invoice values
Secondary quantity 42 packages also verified – no contradiction
Total weight in invoice – Grand Total Gross Weight matches

quantity.motivation: Certificate box 7 states 'G.W 5298,000 KG' (Gross Weight 5298.000 kg). Invoice GRAND TOTAL row shows gross weight '5 298,000' and page 2 shows 'Gross Weight: 5.298,000 kg'. After thousands-separator normalization (rule 4.4.3.3), all values resolve to 5298.000. Exact match. Weight category GW is explicit in certificate and confirmed as 'Total GROSS' / 'Gross Weight' in invoice. Additionally, the secondary quantity '42 PACKAGES' in certificate box 6 matches invoice BOX total of 42. No contradictions found. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate: G.W 5298,000 KG (box 7). Invoice GRAND TOTAL: 5 298,000 (GROSS WEIGHT column, labeled 'Total GROSS'). Invoice page 2: 'Gross Weight: 5.298,000 kg'. Normalization: '5 298,000' → 5298.000 (space = thousands sep); '5.298,000' → 5298.000 (dot = thousands sep); '5298,000' → 5298.000 (comma = decimal). All identical. Net weight in invoice: 3 528,000 – this is a different category (NW vs GW), no contradiction since certificate only states GW. Package count 42 also matches. Result: MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: PL (COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column, both line items)

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has a dedicated 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' column. Both line items (2.1.1.1.1.1.1 and 2.1.1.2.1.1.1) show 'PL' in this column. Page 2 states 'Country of Origin: mentioned above', referring back to the per-line origin codes.
Certificate: 'PL'. Invoice: 'PL'. Exact match. PL = Poland (ISO alpha-2 code).

The certificate is issued under 'EUROPEAN UNION' framework. PL (Poland) is an EU member state. The certificate specifically states PL as the origin country in box 3, not 'EU'. The invoice also states PL. This is a direct match — EU normalization is not needed but PL as an EU member is consistent with the EU certificate framework.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in dedicated COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column in invoice
ISO code PL matches exactly between certificate and invoice

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'PL' as country of origin. Invoice has a dedicated 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' column where both line items show 'PL'. Page 2 confirms 'Country of Origin: mentioned above'. PL (Poland) matches exactly between both documents. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin: 'PL' (box 3). Invoice origin: 'PL' (COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column for both items), plus 'Country of Origin: mentioned above' on page 2. Exact ISO code match. PL = Poland, an EU member state, consistent with the EU Certificate of Origin. Result: MATCH.

evidence.section: GRAND TOTAL row - GROSS WEIGHT column
COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column (both line items)

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate. Remarks field contains '7200224860' which is a shipment number. Payment terms in invoice mention LC optionally but no concrete LC number exists.
Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin, EU/ICC). Document B is invoice (Pro Forma Invoice, 2 pages). Certificate file contains only the certificate. Invoice file contains only the invoice.

Criterion 1 (reference): Certificate remarks '7200224860' matches invoice 'Shipment nr: EAB-7200224860'. Criterion 2 (consignor): ERICSSON AB = ERICSSON AB. Criterion 3 (consignee): KCELL JSC found in delivery address. All three criteria met.
ERICSSON AB found multiple times in invoice (header, manufacturer line, supplier line, footer on page 2). Direct match.
ERICSSON AB = ERICSSON AB. Exact match.
No primary billing field (Invoice to / Bill to / Sold to) found in invoice. Only DELIVERY ADDRESS field with KCELL JSC. Fallback to delivery address per 4.2.1.1.
KCELL JSC found in DELIVERY ADDRESS. Accepted as no primary billing field exists.
KCELL JSC = KCELL JSC. Exact match.
Identity-bearing main designation 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' found exactly in both invoice line items.
'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' / 'Telecommunication Equipment' is a general category header. Main designation matches.
GW 5298.000 KG found in invoice as Grand Total Gross Weight 5298.000 after thousands-separator normalization.
Box 7 value 'G.W 5298,000 KG' used as verification quantity.
GW explicitly stated in certificate. 'Total GROSS' confirmed in invoice.
Invoice values '5 298,000' and '5.298,000' normalized by removing thousands separators (space and dot respectively) to yield 5298.000.
Grand Total Gross Weight in invoice matches certificate GW.
Dedicated COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column in invoice. Both line items show 'PL'.
PL = PL. Exact ISO code match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: TELECOM vs Telecommunication constitutes a MISMATCH in goods description
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The identity-bearing main designation is 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs', which matches exactly. 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' / 'Telecommunication Equipment' is a general product category header, not the identity-bearing designation. Per rule 4.3.4, such additions do not affect the match. Additionally, TELECOM is a universally recognized abbreviation of Telecommunication.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address difference (Torshamnsgatan 23 vs 21-23, postal code 164 80 vs 164 83) constitutes consignor MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address or postal code do not in themselves cause MISMATCH for consignor when company name and country match. Moreover, invoice page 2 footer shows the exact address 'Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN' matching the certificate.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: LC exception should be activated due to mention of 'letter of credit' in invoice payment terms
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 2.2, LC exception is activated only when the CERTIFICATE contains an explicit LC reference with a specific number. The invoice mentions LC as an optional payment method but no concrete LC number is provided. The certificate contains no LC reference at all.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: KCELL JSC appears only in delivery address, not in a billing field, so consignee should be MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.1.1, when no primary billing field exists in the invoice, delivery address may be used as fallback. The invoice has no 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' field. KCELL JSC in DELIVERY ADDRESS is the only named recipient party, so it is accepted.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Ericsson AB i Sverige, mottagaren Kcell JSC i Kazakhstan, varubeskrivningen (AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs), bruttovikten 5 298 kg och ursprungsland Polen (PL) kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate consignor ERICSSON AB matches invoice issuer. Consignee KCELL JSC matches invoice delivery address. Goods 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' found exactly in invoice. Gross weight 5298.000 KG matches after thousands-separator normalization. Origin PL matches exactly.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair: Certificate SEG-25D-403408 vs Pro Forma Invoice dated 20.11.2025

sections.invoice_value: ERICSSON AB, Torshamnsgatan 21-23, S-164 83 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN (p.1); Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN (p.2)
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamn exakt matchat (ERICSSON AB). Land Sverige verifierat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Consignor ERICSSON AB i certifikatet matchar exakt fakturans utställare ERICSSON AB. Land SWEDEN bekräftat. Adressvariationen (21-23 vs 23, 164 83 vs 164 80) påverkar inte bedömningen per regel 4.1.5.

sections.certificate_value: KCELL JSC, ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004 ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN
sections.invoice_value: KCELL JSC, ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004, ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN (DELIVERY ADDRESS)
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamn exakt matchat. Land Kazakhstan verifierat. Leveransadress använd då fakturan saknar separat faktureringsfält.
sections.motivation: Consignee KCELL JSC matchar exakt i fakturans leveransadressfält. Fakturan saknar separat faktureringsfält, varför leveransadressen godtas. Adress och land matchar exakt.

sections.certificate_value: 42 PACKAGES / TELECOM EQUIPMENT / PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs (x2)
sections.invoice_value: Telecommunication Equipment: / AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs (two line items, PL origin)
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' exakt matchad i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Produktbeteckningen 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' återfinns ordagrant i båda fakturaraderna. Allmän kategori 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' vs 'Telecommunication Equipment' är en icke-identitetsbärande tilläggsbeskrivning.

sections.invoice_value: Grand Total Gross Weight: 5 298,000 (p.1) / Gross Weight: 5.298,000 kg (p.2)
sections.rule_applied: Bruttovikt 5298,000 KG verifierad efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare. Viktkategori GW explicit angiven.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt G.W 5298,000 KG matchar fakturans Grand Total Gross Weight 5 298,000 / 5.298,000 kg efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (mellanslag resp. punkt). Sekundär kvantitet 42 paket matchar också.

sections.invoice_value: PL (COUNTRY OF ORIGIN column, both line items)
sections.rule_applied: ISO-landskod PL (Polen) exakt matchad mellan certifikat och faktura.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'PL' matchar exakt med fakturans COUNTRY OF ORIGIN-kolumn där båda artikelraderna anger 'PL'. Polen är EU-medlemsstat, konsistent med EU-certifikatets ramverk.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Alla fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) verifierade som MATCH. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.96. Overall confidence 0.97. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH checkpoints. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
